name: Car Insurance Renewal
description: Auto insurer outbound agent renews a customer's expiring auto policy. Verifies identity, reviews coverage changes, addresses premium concerns, and confirms renewal.

user_profile.name: Policyholder
user_profile.description: An existing auto-insurance customer whose policy is about to expire. Often price-sensitive, may have had a change in circumstances (new vehicle, address, drivers), and may shop competitors.

conversation_profile.agent_role: Renewal specialist at SafeWay Auto Insurance
conversation_profile.goal: Renew the customer's auto policy for the next term, ideally without coverage downgrades.
conversation_profile.knowledge: Renewal must be confirmed with the named policyholder. Premium adjustments may reflect zip code, claims history, or coverage changes. Discounts available: bundling (-10%), telematics (-15%), defensive-driving course (-5%). Loyalty bonus after 3 consecutive renewals.

agent_actions.name: Greeting
agent_actions.description: Open the call, identify SafeWay and yourself.

agent_actions.name: VerifyIdentity
agent_actions.description: Confirm you are speaking with the named policyholder (name + DOB or policy #).

agent_actions.name: StateReason
agent_actions.description: Explain the call is about renewing the expiring auto policy.

agent_actions.name: ReviewCurrentCoverage
agent_actions.description: Walk through current coverage, deductibles, and renewal premium.

agent_actions.name: AskLifeChanges
agent_actions.description: Ask if anything changed (new car, new driver, address, mileage).

agent_actions.name: PitchDiscount
agent_actions.description: Offer applicable discounts (bundling, telematics, defensive-driving, loyalty).

agent_actions.name: HandlePriceObjection
agent_actions.description: Address premium-too-high concerns; offer comparison or alternative coverage.

agent_actions.name: HandleCoverageObjection
agent_actions.description: Address coverage concerns or recommended changes.

agent_actions.name: RequestRenewal
agent_actions.description: Explicitly ask the policyholder to confirm renewal.

agent_actions.name: ConfirmRenewal
agent_actions.description: Confirm renewal completed, summarize next-payment date, thank the customer.

agent_actions.name: ScheduleCallback
agent_actions.description: Offer to call back at a more convenient time.

agent_actions.name: EscalateToAgent
agent_actions.description: Transfer to a licensed agent for complex changes.

agent_actions.name: ClosePolite
agent_actions.description: End the call politely without renewal.

data_dependencies.name: policy_record
data_dependencies.description: Policy management DB: current policy, deductibles, premium, expiry date, vehicle, named drivers.

config.text: POLICY: #INS-882431; expires 2026-06-15; vehicle=2022 Honda Civic LX VIN 1HG..2890; named drivers=1; deductible=$500 collision/$250 comp; premium=$1420/yr; tenure=4yr

data_dependencies.name: claims_history_rag
data_dependencies.description: RAG over claim documents: recent claims, fault assignments, payouts, narrative summaries.

config.text: CLAIMS: 0 at-fault (3yr); 1 comprehensive 2024-09 (windshield, $720 paid, deductible $250); 1 not-at-fault 2023-04 (rear-ended, full subro recovery); driver rating tier=Preferred

data_dependencies.query_template: {mood} customer in cohort {cohort} (state {state}) considering action {action} just said: {user_text}. What claims-history facts, fault-assignment rules, or coverage-decision precedents would help the agent respond?

data_dependencies.name: risk_score_api
data_dependencies.description: Actuarial ML scoring service: telematics-derived risk + projected loss ratio.

config.text: RISK: composite_score=712/1000 (band=low); telematics avg=72mph, max=86mph, harsh_braking=0.3/100mi; usage=11.4k mi/yr (below 15k threshold); projected_loss_ratio=0.41

data_dependencies.name: market_rates_kg
data_dependencies.description: Market-rates knowledge graph: competitor premiums for matching vehicle+zip+driver profile.

config.text: MARKET (same zip+vehicle+age band): peer_avg=$1580/yr; Geico $1510 ($-90 vs ours), Progressive $1620 (+$20), StateFarm $1490 ($-70); ranking: we are 2nd-cheapest of 4

data_dependencies.name: discount_eligibility
data_dependencies.description: Promotions API: real-time eligibility for discount stacking and loyalty offers.

config.text: DISCOUNTS: multi-policy=8% (eligible — has homeowner), paid-in-full=5%, good-driver=10% (auto-applied), telematics=12% (auto-applied), 4yr-loyalty=3%; total stackable=18%

data_dependencies.name: policy_disclosure_cache
data_dependencies.description: Compliance docs cache: state-specific disclosures + cancellation terms.

config.text: DISCLOSURE (MA): 14-day free-look cancellation; policy effective immediately on renewal acceptance; e-sign capture required; auto-billing cycle next on 2026-07-15

cohorts.name: LoyalCustomer
cohorts.description: Multi-year customer who renews routinely; low effort to close.

moods.name: warm_routine
moods.description: Friendly, expects the call, ready to move quickly.

moods.name: mildly_curious
moods.description: Open to hearing what's new or different this year.

moods.name: distracted
moods.description: Multitasking; wants to get the call done.

moods.name: subtly_resistant
moods.description: Loyal but considering alternatives; testing the relationship.

moods.name: calm_negotiator
moods.description: Analytical; treating this as a procurement exercise.

moods.name: frustrated_with_quotes
moods.description: Has spent hours on this; feels each call wastes time.

moods.name: indifferent_to_brand
moods.description: Sees insurance as commodity; lowest price wins.

moods.name: skeptical_of_value
moods.description: Suspicious that premium increases aren't justified.

cohorts.name: LifeChange
cohorts.description: Reports a recent change (new vehicle, driver, address) that affects coverage.

moods.name: transactional
moods.description: Just wants to update the policy and move on.

moods.name: anxious_about_cost
moods.description: Worried the change will push their premium up.

moods.name: informational
moods.description: Asking lots of questions about how the change affects coverage.

moods.name: stressed_general
moods.description: Going through a stressful period (move/divorce/job); low patience.

cohorts.name: CoverageConcerned
cohorts.description: Worried about gaps, limits, deductibles, or claim handling.

moods.name: due_diligence
moods.description: Methodically going through coverage line by line.

moods.name: post_claim_skeptical
moods.description: Recent claim experience colors the conversation.

moods.name: fearful_underinsured
moods.description: Worried they don't have enough; receptive to upsell.

moods.name: frustrated_complexity
moods.description: Annoyed by policy jargon; wants plain answers.

cohorts.name: Skeptical
cohorts.description: Questions the value of insurance overall or this carrier specifically.

moods.name: philosophical
moods.description: Debates the necessity of coverage; intellectual sparring.

moods.name: cynical
moods.description: Assumes carriers nickel-and-dime; expects bad faith.

moods.name: burned_before
moods.description: Has had a bad past experience and isn't over it.

moods.name: curious_open
moods.description: Pushes back but listens — can be persuaded with hard data.

cohorts.name: Hurried
cohorts.description: Insists they're busy or wants a callback.

moods.name: polite_busy
moods.description: Will engage briefly if it's quick; otherwise asks for a callback.

moods.name: annoyed_intrusion
moods.description: Doesn't want to talk now; mild irritation.

moods.name: performative_busy
moods.description: Says they're busy but will engage if the offer is compelling.

moods.name: helpful_relative
moods.description: Lives with the policyholder; can pass along a message.

moods.name: annoyed_stranger
moods.description: Wrong number; wants the call to end.

moods.name: confused
moods.description: Unsure who the named policyholder is or why the call came here.

user_states.name: Unknown
user_states.description: No information yet about who picked up.

user_states.name: IsThemselves
user_states.description: Confirmed identity as the named policyholder.

user_states.name: PriceConcern
user_states.description: Objecting that premium is too high.

user_states.name: CoverageConcern
user_states.description: Objecting about coverage limits, deductibles, or exclusions.

user_states.name: ReportingChange
user_states.description: User mentioned a change in vehicle, address, or drivers.

user_states.name: Busy
user_states.description: User wants to be called back later.

edges.note: Verify before disclosing the reason for call.
If user reports a change, address coverage implications.
Only handle a price concern that was raised.
Complex coverage changes escalate to a licensed agent.
